title.rendered: AMI Tech Day Taiwan Summit 2023 to Highlight the Latest AMI Innovations and Products

content.rendered:
ATLANTA, GEORGIA – AMI®, the global leader in Dynamic Firmware for worldwide computing, is excited to once again host AMI Tech Day Taiwan Summit 2023 on November 16th as part of AMI’s industry-wide collaboration to showcase our latest innovations and products. Amongst the attendees will be some of our biggest industry partners and customers.

AMI is the most experienced independent firmware vendor in the industry. At AMI, we bring decades of experience and knowledge and have integrated our firmware solutions into billions of computing platforms worldwide. Events such as AMI Tech Day Taiwan Summit aim to leverage AMI’s resources and expertise to create synergy amongst our partners and customers to deliver cutting-edge solutions to the market.

This invitation-only event will largely focus on the server market, offering insightful information to the attendees – featuring technical presentations, the latest AMI products, and product roadmaps on boot-up, manageability, security, and services.

“We are looking forward to this year’s AMI Tech Day Taiwan Summit 2023 as it presents an exciting opportunity for AMI to shine a spotlight on our industry in Greater China, helping shape the future of the industry in that region,” says Sanjoy Maity, CEO of AMI.

Follow AMI on LinkedIn and Twitter to receive the latest news and announcements.

AMI is a registered trademark in the US and/or elsewhere. All other trademarks and registered trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
